data.title: Microservices
data.description: Spotify uses a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and allow independent deployment of services.
data.technical_spec: Docker, Kubernetes, and custom in-house services manage the microservices.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Spotify leverages cloud-based solutions for hosting and scaling its services.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google Cloud Platform for its infrastructure needs.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: A global CDN is used to deliver content efficiently to users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Akamai and Cloudflare are commonly used for such purposes.

data.title: RESTful APIs
data.description: Public and private APIs available for integration and extending functionality.
data.technical_spec: HTTP/2, OAuth for secure API requests.

data.title: Data Pipelines
data.description: For processing vast amounts of user data for analytics and recommendations.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka and Apache Flink for real-time data streaming.
